rapid_stop_outs_mfe_under_05pct.comment: Entries that never went green — entry quality issue

slow_bleeds_mfe_05_to_3pct.comment: Got small green then faded — exit timing or trail too tight

late_exits_mfe_over_3pct.comment: Had real edge but gave it all back — winner-protect needed

priority_fixes.recommendation: Top winners gave back 345.4pp combined from MFE peaks. Add a winner-protect anchor: when MFE >= 15%, lock SL at entry + 0.6 × MFE to capture more of the runner.
61 entries never went above +0.5% — these are entry-quality failures. Audit which entry paths/regimes/RVol levels these came from and tighten the conviction floor or require more confirmation.

priority_fixes.target: Losses with MFE >= 3% (real edge given back to negative)
priority_fixes.recommendation: 15 losers had MFE >= 3% then went negative. These are breakeven-stop candidates: when MFE peaks > 3% then retraces 80%, exit at breakeven instead of letting it go red.
